{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/87920408?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sondt99/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sondt99/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sondt99/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sondt99/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/sondt99", "id": 87920408, "login": "sondt99", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjg3OTIwNDA4", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sondt99/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sondt99/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sondt99/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sondt99/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sondt99/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/sondt99", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-48796", "cvss": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}], "description": "### Summary

`FolderSchemeHandlerFactory` was intended to restrict served files to a configured `rootFolder`, but its path validation used a raw string prefix check. A request could escape to a sibling directory whose full path starts with the root folder path, allowing files outside the configured root to be served.

### Details

In affected versions, `FolderSchemeHandlerFactory` canonicalized `rootFolder`, decoded the request path, combined it with the root, and then allowed the file when:

```csharp
filePath.StartsWith(rootFolder, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
```

This does not enforce a directory boundary. For example, `/tmp/app/www2/secret.txt` starts with `/tmp/app/www`, but `www2` is a sibling of `www`, not a child. The same issue applies on Windows, for example `C:\app\www2\secret.txt` starts with `C:\app\www`.

The affected code was reviewed at commit `b5fef3bb4bc58798c95170078c41de92cfe9066e`, assembly version `147.0.100`.

### PoC

Set `rootFolder` to a directory named `www` and create a sibling directory named `www2`:

```text
<temp>/www/index.html
<temp>/www2/secret.txt
```

Register `FolderSchemeHandlerFactory` for `<temp>/www`, then request:

```text
https://folderschemehandlerfactory.test/..%2fwww2/secret.txt
```

The request path is URL-decoded to `../www2/secret.txt`, combined with `<temp>/www`, and canonicalized to:

```text
<temp>/www2/secret.txt
```

Because `<temp>/www2/secret.txt` starts with `<temp>/www` as a string prefix, the affected check passes and `secret.txt` is served from outside `rootFolder`.

Expected vulnerable result: HTTP 200 with the contents of `<temp>/www2/secret.txt`.

Expected fixed result: 404 or equivalent not-found response because the resolved file is outside `rootFolder`.

### Impact

Applications using `FolderSchemeHandlerFactory` for a custom scheme or registered HTTP/HTTPS scheme may expose local files outside the intended served directory. This is most relevant when sensitive sibling directories share the root path prefix, such as `www`/`www2`, `public`/`public_backup`, or `static`/`static-secrets`.

An attacker must be able to cause the embedded browser to request URLs handled by the affected scheme registration.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-85jm-cwp2-mvpv", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-30T18:36:12Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-85jm-cwp2-mvpv", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-85jm-cwp2-mvpv"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-48796"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-30T18:36:12Z", "references": ["https://github.com/cefsharp/CefSharp/security/advisories/GHSA-85jm-cwp2-mvpv", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-85jm-cwp2-mvpv"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/cefsharp/CefSharp/security-advisories/GHSA-85jm-cwp2-mvpv", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/cefsharp/CefSharp", "summary": "CefSharp.Common: `FolderSchemeHandlerFactory` path boundary check can expose files outside the configured root folder", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-30T18:36:13Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-85jm-cwp2-mvpv", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "148.0.90", "package": {"ecosystem": "nuget", "name": "CefSharp.Common"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 148.0.90"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: CefSharp.Common: `FolderSchemeHandlerFactory` path boundary check can expose files outside the configured root folder
